title: delopyrum articulatun
side_effects: Delopyrum articulatun can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions in some individuals. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to liver damage and cardiovascular problems. Additionally, its improper use can cause respiratory issues, including bronchitis and asthma attacks in people with pre-existing conditions. Furthermore, its unregulated use has also been linked to increased blood pressure and irregular heartbeat in some users.
